svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="model-vs-system" name="Model vs System"> <mxGraphModel dx="1414" dy="760" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="960" pageHeight="500" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="m" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#c5cdd5;strokeWidth=2;" target="p5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="m" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#c5cdd5;strokeWidth=2;" target="p4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="m" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#c5cdd5;strokeWidth=2;" target="p1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="m" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#c5cdd5;strokeWidth=2;" target="p2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="m" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#c5cdd5;strokeWidth=2;" target="p3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="m" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#c5cdd5;strokeWidth=2;" target="p6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1f2933;" value="A model becomes a system when you wrap it in scaffolding" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="600" x="180" y="18" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m" parent="1" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#649E00;strokeColor=#304F00;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=14;" value="<font style="font-size: 18px;"><b style="">The model</b><br></font><font style="font-size: 16px;">the easy ~10%</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="76" width="200" x="380" y="222" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=13;" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;">Consistency testing</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="58" width="215" x="60" y="91" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=13;" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;">Grounding &amp; guardrails</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="58" width="215" x="60" y="231" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=13;" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;">Self-critique pass</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="58" width="215" x="60" y="371" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=13;" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;">Trace every step</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="58" width="215" x="685" y="91" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=13;" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;">Human-in-the-loop</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="58" width="215" x="685" y="231" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=13;" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;">Drift monitoring</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="58" width="215" x="685" y="371" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bottom" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=14;fontColor=#5b6770;" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;">The other ~90% is the scaffolding that earns trust in production.</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="600" x="180" y="452" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 15px; margin-left: 420px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1f2933;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1f2933, #c4ccd5); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: A model becomes a system when you wrap it in scaffolding
